name: Baked Truffle Treasures
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Almond delight cereal (crushed to 1 cup)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees. In a medium bowl, beat sugar and butter until combined.
Add eggs, amaretto, honey, and vanilla extract, stirring until well combined.
Stir in cereal, cocoa, and coconut. Pour into an ungreased 2-quart casserole.
Bake for 30 minutes. Turn off oven heat.
Remove from oven and stir immediately until well blended. Let cool to room temperature.
Shape level tablespoons of mixture into 1 1/2-inch balls. Roll each ball in powdered sugar.
Store in an airtight container.
